q: Which hook file implements the Konami-code key listener?
What external URL does the StarChart component fetch repository data from?

Which CSS module file styles the project deck component?
Entering the Konami code on the site activates a hidden feature — which component wires that up?
The Spotify now-playing card fetches an internal API route. Which lib function does that route's handler call?
hops: spotify-card.tsx useSWR /api/spotify -> pages/api/spotify.ts -> import { getNowPlaying } from lib/spotify; distractor: spotify-analysis route

q: Which two components consume the GPU context (directly or via its hook)?
hops: context/GPUContext -> hooks/use-gpu -> footer.tsx + spotify/visualizer.tsx; _app.tsx is the provider, not a consumer

q: Besides the toggle component itself, which two components read the VHS mode context?
hops: context/VhsContext consumers = vhs-toggle (excluded by question), system-logs.tsx, code-hero.tsx; _app is provider

q: The StarChart's overlay data comes through the data barrel file — which two constants files actually define it?
hops: StarChart.tsx imports PROJECT_RELATIONS, PROJECT_FACTIONS from ../../data -> data/index.ts re-exports -> data/project-relations.constants.ts + data/project-factions.constants.ts

q: One component fetches /api/config at runtime — which component, and what third-party service does it configure?
